mapper.select: /* MenuMapper.getMenu */ SELECT MENU_ID AS menuId ,MENU_PID AS menuPid ,MENU_NM AS menuNm ,MENU_ORDR AS menuOrdr ,MENU_TYPE AS menuType ,MENU_DEPTH AS menuDepth ,MENU_URL AS menuUrl ,MENU_ICON AS menuIcon ,USE_YN AS useYn ,SITE_CODE AS siteCode FROM TB_MENU WHERE MENU_DEPTH != '0' AND SITE_CODE = #{siteCode} ORDER BY MENU_ORDR ASC
